features: non greasy cream that rubs in easily
soothing local anasthetic numbs the pain and helps relieve the itching and irritation of minor skin injuries
description: Product description Germolene Antiseptic Cream is a non-greasy cream that rubs into the skin easily. Its antiseptic action helps prevent infection, and its soothing local anaesthetic numbs the pain helping to relieve itching and irritation of minor skin injuries. Germolene Antiseptic Cream's dual action is an effective treatment for: Minor cuts and grazes, Minor burns, Scalds, Blisters, Stings, Insect bites, Spots and chapped or rough skin Ingredients Active Ingredients (w/w): Phenol 1.2% and Chlorhexidine Digluconate 0.25% Also contains: Cetostearyl Alcohol Light Liquid Paraffin Polyoxyethylene Stearyl Ethers Colours (E124 and E110) Dimethicone Methyl Salicylate and Water Directions Please read the enclosed leaflet carefully before using Germolene Antiseptic Cream. DIRECTIONS FOR USE: Thoroughly clean the affected area of skin, apply the cream and rub in gently. In the case of cuts or particularly tender areas apply on a piece of white lint or gauze. For external use only. Replace cap firmly after use. If symptoms persist consult your doctor. Safety Warning Keep out of the reach and sight of children. Do not store above 25°C. See more
